scene.message: There's nothing here.{waitkey}{ret}
A small scrap of paper is{nl} stuck to the frozen floor.{waitkey}{ret}
Read it?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Among the junk is a vintage{nl} costume.{waitkey}{ret}
Got the "Spiegel Mask"!{waitkey}{ret}
Got the "Spiegel Mail"!{waitkey}{ret}
Got the "Spiegel Bein"!{waitkey}{ret}
Got the "Spiegel Blade"!{waitkey}{ret}
Frozen solid.{waitkey}{ret}
Frozen solid.{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: We've got to give it{nl} our all for their sake too.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: If I hit it with Agi,{nl} would it melt~?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: If I hit it with Agi,{nl} would it melt~?{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: A windfall from the{nl} blue.{waitkey}An unexpected find, that was.{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Grasping as ever,{nl} aren't you!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Huh? Oh{wait_fr:30}, well now~{nl} You're right. Sigh...{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Sigh...{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Oh... here too.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: You've found something{nl} nice.{waitkey}{ret}
